howItWorks.metaDescription: How to buy and use TakVPN WireGuard service.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Connect to WireGuard in a few simple steps: sign up, pay with Toman or USDT, download your config directly from the dashboard, and connect on any device.
howItWorks.step1Body: Sign up with your email address.
howItWorks.step2Body: Top up with USDT by sending to our wallet address (TRC20 or ERC20), or pay with Toman through Zarinpal.
howItWorks.step3Body: Pick the duration and traffic that fit you; pay directly from your wallet balance.
howItWorks.step4Body: Download your `.conf` file directly from Dashboard → My VPNs — no middleman, usually within minutes.
howItWorks.step5Body: Import the file into the official WireGuard app on desktop or mobile. 24/7 support is available for setup.
howItWorks.outro: VPN provisioning usually takes a few minutes. Check status under My VPNs. If anything goes wrong, our 24/7 support team can help.

faq.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about TakVPN WireGuard service.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a1: USDT via direct on-chain deposit (TRC20 or ERC20), and Iranian Toman via Zarinpal online payment. Toman is credited to your wallet right after a successful payment.
faq.q2: How do I get my VPN config?
faq.a2: After purchase, go to Dashboard → My VPNs. When status is active, download the WireGuard `.conf` file and import it into the WireGuard app.
faq.a3: Any device with an official or compatible WireGuard client: Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android.
faq.a4: We keep account email, payment and order records, and WireGuard keys needed to operate your subscription. We do not sell personal data.
faq.a5: Yes. Within 7 days of purchase you can request a refund if you are not satisfied with the service. After 7 days, purchases are final except for provisioning failures, which our support team will resolve.
faq.q6: What happens when my plan expires?
faq.a6: Access ends at the plan expiry date. You can purchase a new plan from the dashboard to extend service.
faq.a7: Yes — each plan lists included traffic in GB. Usage is tracked on our infrastructure; see your dashboard for status.
faq.q8: How is the Toman price calculated?
faq.a8: Toman prices are calculated from the USDT/IRR rate stored in the system. Admins update that rate.
faq.q9: Do I need an account to browse plans?
faq.a9: No — plans and pricing are public. You only need an account to pay, manage wallet balance, and download configs.
faq.a10: After wallet payment your order is queued for provisioning. Timing varies; check Dashboard → My VPNs for status.

legal.privacyDescription: How TakVPN collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
legal.termsDescription: Rules for using TakVPN WireGuard VPN service.
legal.privacyS1Body: TakVPN provides WireGuard VPN subscriptions. This policy explains what information we collect and why.
legal.privacyS2Body: Account email and name, wallet and payment records, order history, WireGuard public keys and peer metadata required to deliver the service, and support correspondence you send us.
legal.privacyS3Body: We use your data to operate accounts, process payments, provision VPN peers, prevent abuse, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell personal information to third parties.
legal.privacyS4Body: Keys and configuration are generated for your subscription only. You are responsible for keeping downloaded config files secure on your devices.
legal.privacyS5Body: We retain records as long as needed to provide the service, resolve disputes, and meet legal requirements. You may request account deletion by contacting support.
legal.privacyS6Body: Blockchain networks and hosting providers may process data under their own policies. We share only what is necessary to complete transactions and operate infrastructure.
legal.privacyS7Body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of personal data where applicable law allows. Contact: {contact}
legal.privacyS8Body: Privacy questions: {contact}. We may update this policy.
legal.termsS1Body: By creating an account or using TakVPN you agree to these terms and our Privacy Policy.
legal.termsS2Body: TakVPN sells time-limited WireGuard VPN access with defined duration and traffic limits. Availability depends on network and infrastructure conditions.
legal.termsS3Body: You must use the service lawfully. Abuse, fraud, bulk unsolicited traffic, or activities that harm our network or other users may result in suspension without refund.
legal.termsS4Body: You are responsible for your credentials and all activity under your account. Notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.
legal.termsS5Body: You may request a refund within 7 days of your plan purchase date. Refunds are credited to your wallet balance. After 7 days, purchases are final. If VPN provisioning fails, contact support — we will refund or re-provision. Abuse or terms violations are not eligible for refund.
legal.termsS6Body: We aim for reliable service but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Maintenance or upstream issues may cause temporary outages.
legal.termsS7Body: TakVPN is provided as-is to the extent permitted by law. We are not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the service.
legal.termsS8Body: We may update these terms. Material changes will be reflected on this page. Continued use after updates means you accept the revised terms.
